---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, export format, or UX improvement.
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
<!-- What friction does this solve? What are you trying to do today? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- Describe the shape of the feature. Mockups or existing tools that do this well help. -->

**Constraints that matter here**

- Must stay local-first (no backend, no auth).
- Must keep URL-shareable state.
- Must not bloat the initial route bundle.

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Other ways you thought about solving the same problem. -->
